research_texts.q_44633:
I have reviewed the summary carefully for internal contradictions regarding metrics, indices, counts, dates, and time periods.

**Finding:** There is one contradiction regarding the duration of protests before Rama's announcement.

- The summary states: "After 45 days of protests, Rama announced on July 15, 2026..."
- The summary also states: "Initially sparked by opposition to luxury resort developments in protected areas like the Vjosa-Narta lagoon...the protests have evolved..." with the earliest date mentioned being "May 2026"

If protests began in May 2026 and the announcement was July 15, 2026, this would be approximately 75+ days, not 45 days.

**Revised summary:**

Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama is currently facing significant pressure from widespread protests, dubbed the "Flamingo Revolution," which began in May 2026. Initially sparked by opposition to luxury resort developments in protected areas like the Vjosa-Narta lagoon, including a project linked to Jared Kushner, the protests have evolved into a broader movement against alleged government corruption and calls for Rama's resignation [balkaninsight.com](https://balkaninsight.com/2026/07/15/albanian-protesters-celebrate-as-pm-backtracks-on-controversial-environment-laws/), [bbc.com](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8925jnl0z3o), [dw.com](https://www.dw.com/en/albania-pm-rama-protests-a-stage-for-anti-trump-forces/).

After sustained protests, Rama announced on July 15, 2026, that Albania would repeal the 2015 Law on Strategic Investments and amend the 2024 amendments to the Law on Protected Areas to align with EU standards [balkaninsight.com](https://balkaninsight.com/2026/07/15/albanian-protesters-celebrate-as-pm-backtracks-on-controversial-environment-laws/), [rtsh.al](https://rtsh.al/rti/en/pm-rama-albania-to-repeal-strategic-investments-law-review-protected-areas-law/). This decision came after the European Parliament expressed "deep regret" on June 17, 2026, regarding these laws' impact on protected natural areas [balkaninsight.com](https://balkaninsight.com/2026/07/15/albanian-protesters-celebrate-as-pm-backtracks-on-controversial-environment-laws/). Protesters view Rama's backtracking as a "moral victory," but many continue to demand his resignation [balkaninsight.com](https://balkaninsight.com/2026/07/15/albanian-protesters-celebrate-as-pm-backtracks-on-controversial-environment-laws/), [bbc.com](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8925jnl0z3o). Despite the pressure, Rama has indicated he plans to remain in power

question_texts.q_44633: Will the Government of Albania or Prime Minister Edi Rama resign before September 2026?
